name.jp: マックス☆ハートキャッチ

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>3%</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> 회복합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPさせる。\nこのスキルは、自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: Grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color> and grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Counterattack</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 증가시키고, 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>반격</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間UPさせ、自分の<color=#28d9ed>反撃</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>,并使自身的<color=#28d9ed>反击</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

name.jp: キラキラ☆トゥインクル

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to ignore the target's Resilience and inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상의 효과 저항을 무시하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color>합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で対象の効果抵抗を無視し、対象を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率无视目标的效果抵抗,并对其造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n自身的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: (Passive Effect) At the start of battle, increases Priority by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 전투 개시 시점에 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 증가합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)戦闘開始時、自分の行動ゲージが<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)战斗开始时,行动值提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。
